26.reason: [Loop condition should be i < m, not i <= m, because m is the count of terms, so valid indices are 0 to m-1]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Loop runs one extra iteration because m is the count of terms, but array indices go from 0 to m-1. Using i<=m accesses a1[m] which is uninitialized.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Loop bound should be i < m. Using <= accesses index m which is uninitialized/zero, causing incorrect polynomial multiplication.
